The '''LUX-3 landspeeder''' was a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicle manufactured by [[MandalMotors/Legends|MandalMotors]]. The [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] had a sleek, rounded frame, an enclosed cockpit and twin, rear-mounted engines. It could hover an unusually high 3 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] and had predictive terrain-following sensors.<ref name="BHC" />

The [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]] had [[Missile/Legends|missile]] equipped models on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], [[Terminus/Legends|Terminus]] and [[Port Haven/Legends|Port Haven]].<ref name="BHC" />
